revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type = delete | image = none | class = mbox-cfd | text = '''This category is being considered for {{{1}}}.''' {{#if:{{{section|}}}|This nomination is part of a discussion of several related categories.}}
''This does '''not''' mean that any of the pages in the category will be deleted.'' They may, however, be recategorized.
Please share your thoughts on the matter at '''[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|this category's entry]]''' on the [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion|Categories for discussion]] page. Please do not empty the category or remove this notice while the discussion is in progress.
{{strong|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|action=edit§ion=2}} add entry]}}: '''{{subst:{{{2}}}2{{#if:{{{cfd2type|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{cfd2type|}}}|deletion||{{!}}type={{{cfd2type}}}}}}}{{!}}{{PAGENAME}}{{!}}{{#if:{{{section|}}}|header={{{section}}}{{!}}}}{{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{{target}}}{{!}}{{#if:{{{target2|}}}|target2={{{target2}}}{{!}}}}}}text={{var|Your reason(s) for the proposed {{{4}}}.}} ~~~~}}'''
'''Administrators''': {{{admin-override|If this category is empty, and all [[Special:WhatLinksHere/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|incoming links]] have been cleaned up, [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|wpReason={{urlencode:{{{completed-action}}} per the discussion at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]. }}}}&action=delete click here to delete].{{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}} }}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Category|[[Category:Categories for {{{5}}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{DMC|Categories for discussion|from|{{{startmonth|{{{month}}}}}} {{{startyear|{{{year}}}}}}}}[[Category:All categories for discussion]] }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cfd_all here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type = delete | image = none | class = mbox-cfd | text = '''This category is being considered for {{{1}}}.''' {{#if:{{{section|}}}|This nomination is part of a discussion of several related categories.}}
''This does '''not''' mean that any of the pages in the category will be deleted.'' They may, however, be recategorized.
Please share your thoughts on the matter at '''[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|this category's entry]]''' on the [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion|Categories for discussion]] page. Please do not empty the category or remove this notice while the discussion is in progress.
{{strong|[{{fullurl:Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{CURRENTYEAR}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTDAY}}|action=edit§ion=2}} add entry]}}: '''{{subst:{{{2}}}2{{#if:{{{cfd2type|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{cfd2type|}}}|deletion||{{!}}type={{{cfd2type}}}}}}}{{!}}{{PAGENAME}}{{!}}{{#if:{{{section|}}}|header={{{section}}}{{!}}}}{{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{{target}}}{{!}}{{#if:{{{target2|}}}|target2={{{target2}}}{{!}}}}}}text={{var|Your reason(s) for the proposed {{{4}}}.}} ~~~~}}'''
